final:
module sipo_shift_register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire serial_in,
    output reg [4:0] parallel_out
);
    reg [4:0] data_buffer;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_buffer <= 5'b00000;
        end else begin
            data_buffer <= {data_buffer[3:0], serial_in}; // Shift left and input new bit
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        parallel_out = data_buffer; // Output parallel data
    end
endmodule
